task: Epic 1 — strip community/marine modules and rebrand SignBoard→ExhibitOS across exhibit-os repo (~40 files)
what_worked: Cleanly deleted 6 feature modules (tides/surf/fishing/weather/lightning + Wharfside kiosk configs) and all their wiring — routers, seeds, background services, client tabs/cases, api.ts interfaces, model exports — verified via git grep that zero dangling refs remained; rebranded docker-compose/env/localStorage token/titles consistently; pruned now-unused deps (httpx/ephem/astral) after checking no kept code imported them; followed git rules (staged only its files, single commit, pushed).
what_struggled: Left one orphaned dead function _get_timezone() whose ZoneInfo forward-ref annotation broke Pyright (reportUndefinedVariable) — its import-grep check matched the live import inside the function body and missed that the whole function was now uncalled. Orchestrator had to delete it. Also could not run the client TypeScript build (node_modules absent) so compile-correctness of client edits is statically-checked only, not verified.

task: ExhibitOS wiki-ingest pipeline + exhibit card rendering (ADR-0001 slice 1): Exhibit model, DokuWiki parser/ingest, public API, /exhibit/:slug card render, admin Exhibits tab
what_worked: Clean idempotent ingest keyed by slug with content_hash; correctly PRESERVED ExhibitOS-owned fields (hero_image/video_url/etc) across re-ingest while refreshing wiki fields; proper public-vs-auth endpoint split (public list/detail for displays, authed POST /ingest); handled the duplicate-title slug collision (two 'TRS-80 Model 100') with stable -2 disambiguation; verified import + client build + API responses + idempotent second run (108 unchanged) before committing; followed git rules (only its files, didn't commit gitignored VCF data).
what_struggled: Year extraction inherited the earlier earliest-year-in-range heuristic, so model numbers in titles parse as years (Commodore VIC-20 -> 1701, RCA COSMAC VIP -> 1801, Gemini-10X -> 1660, Bendix Tape Drive -> 1942). Should exclude year-candidates that sit inside the title's model number. Also the trailing DokuWiki horizontal-rule '-----' leaked into the rendered card body (parser strips subsection markers but not trailing ---- rules). Both cosmetic, not blocking.
